THE COURT GRANTED THE CONSOLIDATION OF THE FOLLOWING CASES IN SUB-GROUP A: AKERS, BEAVERS, CAMMUSE, FRANKLIN & HUGLE; SUB-GROUP B: ALEXANDER, BARTHOLOMEW, & BURKS; SUB-GROUP C: BERTACCHI, LAY, SAMPLE, BROWNING, EDWARDS, MALLEIN & JORDAN; SUB-GROUP D: BOGUNOVIC; SUB-GROUP E: COOK, EPLEY & JADRYEV. THE COURT DENIED THE CONSOLIDATION OF COOKE AND FRANCHON IN SUB-GROUP F. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AS TO THE SUB-GROUPS THAT WERE GRANTED. DEFENDANT BRAGG INVESTMENT COMPANY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AS TO THE COOKE AND FRANCHON CASES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647 (206)
